next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: User asked amount earned since beginning of March 2026 for service line 'buyer-language refinement memo' and requested only a number. Exhaustiveness: searched invoices for exact double-space (0), then normalized single-space (3 matches) and read all 3 matching files. Date filter: since March 2026 => issued_on >= 2026-03-01. Matching line_eur values by file: 2025-12-01=105 (excluded), 2025-12-29=105 (excluded), 2026-03-26=180 (included). Arithmetic: 180=180.
next_step.observation: Across all three matching invoices, only the 2026-03-26 invoice is within the requested date range and its matching line item is 180 EUR.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system and relevant finance schema/rulebooks, then read all matching invoice files before calculating.
function.outcome_justification: Service-line search found 3 invoice records containing 'buyer-language refinement memo'. After reading each file, only invoice INV-0005 (issued_on 2026-03-26) is on/after 2026-03-01, with matching line_eur 180; the two 2025 invoices are before the start date.
